error_signature.verbatim_message: Stop hook error: Failed with non-blocking status code: No stderr output

steps: End any Claude Code turn in OLMO project
Codex Stop hook hangs until 900ms timeout
Harness emits 'Failed with non-blocking, no stderr'

gaps: Frequencia exata nao medida — 'intermittent' baseado em 5 sentinel entries em 2 dias

downstream_hints.archaeologist: Buscar PRs/commits recentes em openai/codex-plugin-cc tocando readHookInput ou stdin handling. Issue #191 ja aberta sem comments.
downstream_hints.adversarial: Tentar refutar: e realmente stdin block, ou pode ser timeout do manifest (900ms) ser apertado por outras razoes (Node cold start, antivirus)?
